misconfig_patterns: OpenAI-compat API exposed on public interface

active_probe.false_positive_check: model id field must contain .gguf extension — uniquely identifies llama.cpp server

deployment_tells: Server: llama.cpp response header uniquely identifies native binary (port 8080 default)

GGUF quantization level → estimate available VRAM
